mapper.select: SELECT w.id AS id, w.film_id AS filmId, w.added_at AS addedAt, f.slug AS filmSlug, f.judul AS filmTitle, f.poster_url AS posterUrl, f.tahun_rilis AS tahunRilis FROM film_watchlist w JOIN film f ON w.film_id = f.id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.added_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film_watchlist WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film_watchlist (film_id, user_id, added_at) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{userId}, NOW())
